title: TechSaksham is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: TechSaksham is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Join the TechSaksham family as a Subject Matter Expert in Kolkata. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About TechSaksham:
TechSaksham is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Support students with special educational needs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TechSaksham!
